rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings to existing output features or auxiliary variables
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component names, ports, and connections in the input AADL model
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use assign for implementation-level bindings to existing output features or auxiliary variables
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
